Marketplace

The first global marketplace
built for field hockey.

Players, coaches and clubs from 30+ countries in one searchable network. Whatever your role — get discovered, find talent, or post your next opportunity.

🏃

Players — get discovered

Build your profile and let coaches and clubs worldwide find you. Post your availability and let the game come to you.

📋

Coaches — find your next role

Showcase your CV, post your availability, and connect with clubs looking for coaching staff around the world.

🏟️

Clubs — recruit globally

Post open positions, browse player and coach profiles, and recruit talent directly inside Veld.

Join the Marketplace
For Coaches — Selection

Your lineup,
confirmed instantly.

Send your match selection directly to players. They confirm or decline in one tap — with a full availability history across the entire season.

  • Personal message to each player
  • One-tap confirm or decline
  • Full season history per player
For Coaches — Rotations

Every player,
every minute.

A live pitch board with a built-in timer. Track play time, plan substitutions in real time, and build data-driven rotation strategies.

  • Visual pitch board — drag and place
  • Real-time minute tracker per player
  • Substitution history saved automatically
For Coaches & Clubs — Squad

Your whole squad,
at a glance.

Full squad management with player profiles, evaluations, training logs and attendance — giving coaches and clubs the depth of insight they need.

  • Player profiles and evaluations
  • Training sessions and attendance
  • Live match tracking and automatic stats
Pricing

Start with the Marketplace.
Grow from there.

Free for everyone during Beta. From July 2026, start with the Marketplace for €2.99 — or unlock the full Coach Pro toolkit. The Marketplace is always included in Coach Pro at no extra charge.
